[2018-07-13 20:17] coscott: I hear "photonic rainmaker" means practically legal, but can you say whether it is easier or harder, and whether you changed the expert mission? I am sad that I cant slowly enjoy the expert missions because I have to beat them ASAP, since otherwise you might change them without warning and make them easier, and I will never be able to play them.
[2018-07-13 20:18] elyot: We did not change the expert
[2018-07-13 20:20] elyot: @Zhe @SwapGo We'll explain more about localization next week. Our goal is to allow anyone to add any language they want, and we will get the campaign professionally translated into some languages where we feel it makes sense to do so, but before we even start that, we want to give our community the chance to develop the vocabulary for the game
[2018-07-13 20:22] elyot: There will probably also be a lot of bugs and problems that we'll have to fix, and we'll mostly be relying on the community to help identify those issues

[2018-09-02 10:22] elyot: @mrguy888 so all the deals we're doing are more like regional distributors than publishers, we're still self publishing on steam
[2018-09-02 10:24] elyot: Like say our game goes on kongregate, I mean technically they are a publisher but it's more like just being In a store. But then they also do deals with some games where they promote them and take a bigger cut of revenues and then they're acting more as a publisher.
[2018-09-02 10:25] elyot: And there are a lot of such sites and stores in non-English land and non-steam land
[2018-09-02 10:25] elyot: Road to glory is a hardcore system of quests for new and not-so-new players
